modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Printer requires manual intervention for duplex printing.

full_description_text: User reports issue with duplex printing. Printer prompts to return paper to tray two. User must press OK to continue. This process is not automatic as expected.
short_description: Printer requires manual intervention for duplex printing.
description: User reports issue with duplex printing. Printer prompts to return paper to tray two. User must press OK to continue. This process is not automatic as expected.
